ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power line */,
  "from_node" INTEGER /* Node at the starting point of the power line */,
  "to_node" INTEGER /* Node at the ending point of the power line */,
  "r" REAL /* Resistance of the power line (in pu) */,
  "x" REAL /* Reactance of the power line (in pu) */,
  "y_half" REAL /* Half of the susceptance of the power line (in pu) */,
  "y" REAL /* Susceptance of the power line (in pu) */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of power line (e.g., overhead, underground, submarine) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the power line (in MVA) */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the power line was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for next inspection */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the power line (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_lines_to_node FOREIGN KEY ("to_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_lines_from_node FOREIGN KEY ("from_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node (substation) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of node (e.g., transmission, distribution, generation) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the node (in MVA) */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the node */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmission_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission line */,
  "from_node" INTEGER /* Node at the starting point of the transmission line */,
  "to_node" INTEGER /* Node at the ending point of the transmission line */,
  "r" REAL /* Resistance of the transmission line (in pu) */,
  "x" REAL /* Reactance of the transmission line (in pu) */,
  "y_half" REAL /* Half of the susceptance of the transmission line (in pu) */,
  "y" REAL /* Susceptance of the transmission line (in pu) */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission line (e.g., overhead, underground, submarine) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the transmission line (in MVA) */,
  "installed_date" TEXT /* Date when the transmission line was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for next inspection */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Status of the transmission line (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_lines_to_node FOREIGN KEY ("to_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transmission_lines_from_node FOREIGN KEY ("from_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power flow record */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the power_lines table */,
  "from_node" INTEGER /* Node at the starting point of the power line */,
  "to_node" INTEGER /* Node at the ending point of the power line */,
  "power_flow" REAL /* Power flow through the power line (in MW) */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the power flow was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_flow_from_node FOREIGN KEY ("from_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_flow_to_node FOREIGN KEY ("to_node") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_flow_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_id") REFERENCES power_lines ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, operator, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the nodes table */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Read permission for the user at the node */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Write permission for the user at the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was recorded */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the nodes table */,
  "power_flow" REAL /* Power flow through the node (in MW) */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage at the node (in kV) */,
  "current" REAL /* Current at the node (in A) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the maintenance was performed */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the nodes table */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., inspection, repair, replacement) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic result */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytic was performed */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the nodes table */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analytic (e.g., power flow analysis, voltage analysis) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
